sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46427" key="zwhro/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ζωηρός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ά</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ζωή</etym>) <sense id="n46427.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">living</tr_> and <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">giving life</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
